description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stylised rectangular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Black dialFeatures: A screw to reset timeStrap style: Black rexin strap secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature Fastrack hard caseWarranty:nbsp;2 years on mechanism only, 1-year on battery and metal strap (manufacturing defects only), no warranty on leather and other strapsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
